name: HdInsight.Containers
description: Returns a navigational table containing a row for each container found at the account URL, `account`, from an Azure storage vault. Each row contains a link to the container blobs.

name: HdInsight.Contents
description: Returns a navigational table containing a row for each container found at the account URL, `account`, from an Azure storage vault. Each row contains a link to the container blobs.

name: HdInsight.Files
signature: HdInsight.Files(account as text, containerName as text) as table
description: Returns a table containing a row for each blob file found at the container URL, `account`, from an Azure storage vault. Each row contains properties of the file and a link to its content.
